pack_name: Energy and Power Sector Compliance Overlay
description: Sector-specific screening controls for Canadian energy, power, pipeline, electricity, nuclear, environmental, safety, authorization, and regulatory compliance documents.

metadata.scope: Canada sector overlay for Energy and Power. Intended to be applied with canada_core_control_library. Federal starter pack; provincial/territorial energy regulator obligations may also apply.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/provincial/territorial legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Nuclear Safety and Control Act
primary_sources.issuer: Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission / Justice Laws

primary_sources.name: Canadian Environmental Protection Act compliance and enforcement
Baseline Cyber Security Controls for Small and Medium Organizations

rules.title: CER authorization, order, permit, or licence evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Canadian Energy Regulator approvals, pipeline certificate, power-line permit/licence, order, or compliance condition evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Safety, emergency management, or incident reporting evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safety plans, emergency management, incident reporting, integrity management, or corrective action evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Nuclear licence or radiation safety evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for CNSC licence, nuclear safety, radiation protection, dosimetry, or nuclear security evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Nuclear Safety and Control Act / CNSC

rules.title: Environmental compliance or pollution-prevention evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for environmental assessment, pollution prevention, emissions, spill reporting, waste management, or CEPA evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: CEPA / Environment and Climate Change Canada

rules.title: Critical infrastructure cybersecurity evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for incident response, access control, patching, backup, monitoring, and business continuity evidence for energy operations.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Canadian Centre for Cyber Security baseline controls
